identitySentence: Goline & Roland Law Firm, PLLC is a Denton law firm formed in 2022 by attorneys whose practice experience reaches back to 2008, serving family law, criminal defense, and personal injury clients in Denton County and Hopkins County.

concept.headline: Family, Criminal Defense, and Injury Help from a Denton Firm That Answers
concept.subheadline: Whether you are facing a family dispute, a criminal charge, or a serious injury, you should not have to wonder when someone will get back to you. Tell us what happened, and a Denton attorney will follow up with real consultation times.
credibilityPoints: Formed in 2022 by three attorneys whose practice experience reaches back to 2008
Senior Partner Theresa Blake Goline named to Super Lawyers Rising Stars, 2023-2026
Offices in Denton and Sulphur Springs serving Denton County and Hopkins County
Published case results and client testimonials for prospective clients to review

sections.title: Practice focus
sections.body: Goline & Roland Law Firm, PLLC practices in three areas: family law, criminal defense, and personal injury. The firm's attorneys guide clients through matters such as custody disputes, criminal charges, and injury claims, drawing on practice experience that reaches back to 2008.

sections.title: Denton roots
sections.body: The firm is based at 1413 E. McKinney St. in Denton, serving clients across Denton County, with a second office on Main Street in Sulphur Springs for Hopkins County matters. Gregory C. Goline founded his predecessor Denton firm in 2010 before the three partners formed Goline & Roland in 2022.

sections.title: What to expect
sections.body: When you reach out, you will be asked for your contact information and a short description of your situation, so the right attorney can review it before you ever sit down. You will see available consultation times up front, and you will know what to bring and what not to bring before your appointment is confirmed.

outreachDraft.subject: Proof matters more than promises: 15 days, 1 demo, and a Lead Capturer that can pay for itself before you ever have to.
outreachDraft.body:
DRAFT — NOT SENT. Review and authorize before any outreach.

To the attorneys and team at Goline & Roland Law Firm, PLLC:

Your firm took its current shape in August 2022, when Gregory Goline brought his established Denton practice together with Theresa Blake Goline and Rachel Roland, forming a three-attorney firm handling family law, criminal defense, and personal injury matters from offices in Denton and Sulphur Springs.

Why a Lead Capturer fits Goline & Roland: your website already does a great deal right. It is modern, secure, organized around your three practice areas, and it asks visitors to contact you at every turn. What it cannot do today is carry that visitor the rest of the way. There is no online scheduling, so every inquiry waits on a form submission or a phone call, and the time between a visitor's message and your reply is time that person can spend calling another firm. For a practice spanning family, criminal, and injury matters, where people often reach out at urgent moments, that gap can cost real consultations.

What we built for you: a Lead Capturer configured for Goline & Roland, carrying a custom identity sentence drawn from your firm's verified record: "Goline & Roland Law Firm, PLLC is a Denton law firm formed in 2022 by attorneys whose practice experience reaches back to 2008, serving family law, criminal defense, and personal injury clients in Denton County and Hopkins County." Beneath it sits a custom contact form built around your practice.

How it works:
- Every inquiry is emailed directly to your firm's inbox.
- The potential client automatically receives a topical response specific to their message, with no staff action required.
- That response presents your available consultation times.
- A $50 reservation deposit confirms the appointment, so your calendar holds committed consultations.

We will not promise you revenue figures. Instead, we offer proof: a 15-day proof period during which you test the complete experience yourself.

How to test your Lead Capturer (15 minutes):
1. Submit a clearly labeled TEST inquiry through your form using a customer email address you control.
2. Do not enter confidential client information at any point.
3. Confirm your firm's inbox receives a real email notification.
4. Confirm the notification contains every field displayed on the form.
5. Confirm the subject line identifies your firm and the likely matter type.
6. Confirm the Reply-To address contains the customer email you submitted.
7. Confirm the system automatically generates a response specific to your TEST inquiry.
8. Confirm that response is sent to the customer email without any action from your staff.
9. Confirm the customer email actually receives it.
10. Confirm the response addresses the actual topic of the inquiry.
11. Confirm it presents genuine available consultation times.
12. Select one of those times.
13. Confirm the $50 reservation requirement appears.
14. Confirm the preparation list fits the matter you described.
15. Confirm the prohibited-item list includes legal documents.
16. In the payment sandbox, confirm the appointment locks only after a verified $50 payment event.

If any step fails, the test fails. Contact us and we will address it before you owe anything.

Fifteen days, one demo, and your own inbox as the scoreboard. When you are ready, reply to this email and we will schedule your proof period.

The IntakeBrief Team
[Physical mailing address: provided before any send]
If you would prefer not to hear from us again, reply with 'unsubscribe' and we will remove you immediately.
